title: NMO-Modded
description: NMO Modded - Modpack for the NMO Minecraft SMP 2024
body:
# NMO-Modded: The Yugoslav Experience in Minecraft

Dive into the rich history, diverse cultures, and inventive spirit of the former Yugoslavia with NMO, a comprehensive Minecraft mod that brings the essence of Yugoslavia into your Minecraft world. From the industrious revolutions that marked the era to the mystical landscapes that inspired countless folk tales of magic and witches, NMO offers a unique blend of technology, exploration, and mysticism, all wrapped in the iconic Yugo spirit.

## Features
**YugoSpace Program:** Ever dreamed of launching a Yugo into space? Now's your chance! The YugoSpace Program allows players to engineer their very own space-faring Yugos to explore the cosmos, visit custom-designed planets inspired by Yugoslav folklore, and establish socialist utopias across the galaxy.

**Industrial Revolution:** Yugoslav Edition: Experience the golden age of Yugoslav industry. Build massive factories, harness the power of the Sava and Danube rivers, and produce everything from household appliances that never break to the iconic Yugo cars. Just watch out for the occasional factory strike!

**Botanic Balconies:** Inspired by the lush balconies and gardens of Yugoslavia's urban landscapes, this feature allows players to cultivate a wide array of plant life, from medicinal herbs used by Balkan witches to the grapes used in homemade rakija. Discover secret plant combinations to brew powerful potions or create a serene Slavic garden.

**Witchcraft and Balkan Magic:** Dive deep into the mystic arts of the Balkans. Learn ancient Slavic rituals, craft amulets to ward off evil spirits, or become a master of weather magic to ensure your crops flourish. Encounter mythical creatures from Yugoslav folklore and choose whether to battle them or harness their powers.

**Yugo Racing & Rally:** What's a Yugoslav-themed mod without the thrill of Yugo racing? Customize your Yugo with parts scavenged from across the lands or won in daring races. Participate in rally events through treacherous Balkan landscapes, from the Adriatic coast to the mountains of Slovenia.

**Socialist Self-Management:** Introducing a new governance system for your Minecraft communities. Establish worker councils, plan your collective economies, and manage resources together. Can you achieve a higher standard of living for your village, or will you succumb to the pressures of capitalist pigs?
